title: Ultimate 10-Day East Asia Combo: Thailand, Malaysia & Singapore Expedition
description:
Experience the best of East Asia in one seamless 9-night, 10-day journey. This curated combo package takes you through the dazzling highlights of Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore, combining modern cityscapes with tropical island escapes. 

Your adventure begins in Thailand, where you'll explore the vibrant streets of Bangkok and the sun-drenched beaches of Pattaya. Enjoy a high-speed excursion to Coral Island for water sports and paragliding before diving into Bangkok’s rich history with a tour of its famous Wats (temples). 

Next, fly to Singapore, the "Heart of Asia." Discover the iconic Merlion Park, take a cable car to Sentosa Island, and witness the spectacular Wings of Time show. 

The journey concludes in Malaysia, featuring the ultra-modern Petronas Twin Towers in Kuala Lumpur and the breezy heights of Genting Highlands. Experience the cultural depth of the Batu Caves and the ancient Indo-Moorish architecture of the capital city.
highlights: Thailand: Coral Island speed boat tour, Bangkok city & temple exploration
Singapore: Sentosa Island, Madame Tussauds, and Marina Bay sights
Malaysia: Genting Highland cable car ride and Kuala Lumpur landmarks
Comfort: Stay in handpicked 3-star accommodations throughout the trip
inclusions: Flights: Roundtrip airfare is included in this package
Accommodations: 9 nights of 3-star hotel stays: 2 nights in Bangkok, 2 nights in Pattaya, 2 nights in Singapore, and 3 nights in Kuala Lumpur
Thailand Sightseeing: Temple and City tour of Bangkok and a full excursion to Coral Island
Singapore Sightseeing: Comprehensive Singapore city tour and Sentosa Island package including a 1-way cable car ride, Madame Tussauds, Wings of Time, and Images of Singapore
Malaysia Sightseeing: Kuala Lumpur city tour and a visit to Genting Highlands
Guide Services: A professional English-speaking guide to escort you throughout the trip
Transfers: All scheduled tours and ground transfers are covered
Meals: Meals are provided as specifically mentioned in the daily itinerary
Visas & Taxes: Includes Singapore visa on arrival, Thailand and Malaysia visa fees, plus government taxes and service charges
exclusions: Personal Expenses: Any items of a personal nature such as laundry, shopping, tips, and telephone bills
Additional Meals: Any meals or food items not explicitly listed in the "includes" section
Unscheduled Transfers: Any personal transfers or charges incurred due to halting
Surcharges: Potential hotel surcharges during special events, exhibitions, or holiday dates
Unspecified Items: Any other item or activity not mentioned under the 'Package Includes' heading
